name: Kaedim
description: Magically Generate Custom 3D Models in Minutes. Stop losing hours to modeling tools. Generate stunning 3D art with nothing more than an image.

name: TextureLab
description: Instant and Unique 3D Textures for Your Next Game. Generate 3D textures for your game in seconds thanks to AI.

name: lumalabs
description: Imagine 3D V1.2 (Alpha). An early experiment to prototype and create 3D with text. Access to generation is gradually expanding to everyone on the waitlist.

name: ChatGPT
description: AI-powered conversational assistant that can answer questions, write content, and help with various tasks using natural language processing.

name: Midjourney
description: AI image generation tool that creates stunning artwork from text descriptions. Known for its artistic style and high-quality outputs.

name: DALL-E
description: OpenAI's image generation AI that creates realistic images and art from natural language descriptions.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source text-to-image AI model that can generate detailed images from text descriptions. Free to use and modify.

name: Claude
description: AI assistant by Anthropic designed to be helpful, harmless, and honest. Great for analysis, writing, and coding tasks.

name: GitHub Copilot
description: AI pair programmer that helps you write code faster. It suggests whole lines or entire functions right inside your editor.

name: Notion AI
description: AI-powered writing assistant integrated into Notion. Helps with brainstorming, drafting, and editing content.
